title: Thank you for confirming your email. To keep your account safe, we need check your identity
body: By providing your date of birth and one ID number, you consent to sharing this information with our third-party vendor. We will only use these once and not share or save them without your permission.
labelId: Which ID number can you provide?
optionHelperMedicaidId: This number can be found on your Medicaid letters and is typically 7 or 8 digits long.
optionHelperAccountId: This number can be found on your SNAP or TANF letters and is typically 7 or 8 digits long.
optionHelperPersonId: This number can be found on your SNAP or TANF letters and is typically 7 or 8 digits long.
labelItin: Enter your Individual Taxpayer ID Number (ITIN)
labelAccountId: Enter your SNAP or TANF account ID
labelPersonId: Enter your SNAP or TANF person ID
